queries: Home Depot HD Q4 2025 earnings results

results.title: Pro Forecast: March 2026 Outlook
results.snippet: Despite high levels of economic uncertainty and ongoing affordability challenges, the housing market has shown positive indicators in early 2026.

results.title: Home Depot CEO says with the housing market stalemate customers are not investing
results.snippet: Home Depot is struggling to beat a stalling housing market as customers delay their home improvement projects, CEO Ted Decker said. The housing market is stalled despite low mortgage rates with home sales falling sharply and nearly 20% of new homes facing price cuts.

results.title: The Home Depot Predicts a Rough Housing Market in 2026
results.snippet: The Home Depot is making some wild predictions for where the housing market is headed in 2026 and you'll be surprised to hear what they have to say. For 2026 they expect the home improvement market could see outcomes between a contraction.

results.title: Home Depot shows it has faith in a housing market rebound
results.snippet: A lot of people have been waiting for a housing market recovery and so far 2026 has not delivered with new U.S. home sales plunging. Home Depot is making plans to expand its store footprint signaling that it expects the housing market and home improvement sector to rebound over time.

results.title: Home Depot flags rising unease among homeowners
results.snippet: Home Depot beat on earnings but housing transactions fell and executives said customers are worried about housing affordability, job stability and higher financing costs. The company forecast 2026 comparable sales between flat and up 2% saying affordability pressures and consumer uncertainty are likely to persist.

results.snippet: Yahoo Finance details Home Depot analyst estimates for earnings, revenue, EPS through 2028, with 26-34 analysts providing forecasts such as $41.54B revenue for Q1 2026 and EPS of $3.41.

results.title: Home Depot (HD) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
results.snippet: 33 analysts have set an average twelve-month price target of $414.17 for Home Depot stock, with a high target of $470.00 and low of $320.00, implying over 22% upside from recent prices.

results.snippet: Home Depot stock is up 8% YTD with a valuation model projecting a $463 target price into 2026, representing about 25% potential upside based on analyst forecasts and growth inputs.
